title: pi-chart vitals row
description: One sample in timeline/<day>/vitals.jsonl. Carries the same provenance shape as events so monitor outputs are traceable to their source extension and addressable via the vitals:// evidence URI.

sampled_at.description: Wall-clock or sim-clock instant the value was observed.

encounter_id.description: Encounter the sample belongs to. Required so vitals:// URIs can scope by encounter.

kind.description: Provenance channel, e.g. monitor_extension, lab_analyzer, poc_device.

ref.description: Source-specific identifier, e.g. pi-sim-monitor or instrument serial.

value.description: Numeric for most metrics; strings/bools allowed for categorical readings.

context.description: Modifiers that condition the reading, e.g. o2_device, o2_flow_lpm, position.

quality.description: Signal quality flag. currentState drops invalid samples; questionable samples remain visible to downstream readers.

artifact.description: If the sample is artifact-laden, what kind, e.g. motion_possible.
